title: gentianella campestris subsp. baltica
intro: Gentianella campestris subsp. baltica, also known as Baltic spring gentian, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the gentian family (Gentianaceae), native to Europe and parts of Asia. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used in folk medicine to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and stomach ulcers. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and exhibit antimicrobial and antioxidant properties, which may help to protect against oxidative stress and promote overall well-being. Gentianella campestris subsp. baltica can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, tinctures, and capsules, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
